description_en: Repeat the Vega observation deliberately: focus, refocus, swap nothing - and confirm the fringe never leaves. This is physics, not error.
description_zh: 有意重复织女星观测：调焦、再调焦、什么都不换——确认彩边永远不会消失。这是物理，不是失误。
hint_text_en: Bring Vega into focus, then look for red on one side of the star and blue on the other.
hint_text_zh: 先把织女星调到清晰，再寻找星点两侧错开的红蓝边缘。
success_text_en: Repeat the Vega observation deliberately: focus, refocus, swap nothing - and confirm the fringe never leaves. This is physics, not error.
success_text_zh: 有意重复织女星观测：调焦、再调焦、什么都不换——确认彩边永远不会消失。这是物理，不是失误。

description_en: Build the Newtonian: external supports on the main blueprint, mirrors inside the Optical Tube Assembly, then collimate and point it at the Moon.
description_zh: 组装牛顿镜：主蓝图装外部支撑，镜筒组件里装镜面，完成准直后对准月球。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Build the Newtonian: external supports on the main blueprint, mirrors inside the Optical Tube Assembly, then collimate and point it at the Moon.
success_text_zh: 组装牛顿镜：主蓝图装外部支撑，镜筒组件里装镜面，完成准直后对准月球。

description_en: Same star as L23 and L25 - now through mirrors. Compare what the edge of Vega looks like tonight.
description_zh: 和 L23、L25 同一颗星——这次经过的是镜面。比较今晚织女星的边缘。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Same star as L23 and L25 - now through mirrors. Compare what the edge of Vega looks like tonight.
success_text_zh: 和 L23、L25 同一颗星——这次经过的是镜面。比较今晚织女星的边缘。

description_en: A Newtonian focuses by sliding the eyepiece on the side focuser. Find Jupiter and practice the different feel.
description_zh: 牛顿镜靠侧置调焦座移动目镜来合焦。找到木星，练习这种不同的手感。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: A Newtonian focuses by sliding the eyepiece on the side focuser. Find Jupiter and practice the different feel.
success_text_zh: 牛顿镜靠侧置调焦座移动目镜来合焦。找到木星，练习这种不同的手感。

description_en: A bright star is the harshest collimation test. Align the optical axis carefully before observing Sirius.
description_zh: 亮星是最严苛的准直考题。观测天狼星前，请把光轴校准到位。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: A bright star is the harshest collimation test. Align the optical axis carefully before observing Sirius.
success_text_zh: 亮星是最严苛的准直考题。观测天狼星前，请把光轴校准到位。

description_en: Point the big mirror at the Orion Nebula and see what extra light-gathering really buys.
description_zh: 把大主镜对准猎户座大星云，看看更强的集光能力究竟带来什么。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Point the big mirror at the Orion Nebula and see what extra light-gathering really buys.
success_text_zh: 把大主镜对准猎户座大星云，看看更强的集光能力究竟带来什么。

description_en: Andromeda through the reflector: let your eyes adapt and use averted vision on the faint halo.
description_zh: 用反射镜看仙女座：让眼睛适应黑暗，用侧视法捕捉暗淡的光晕。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Andromeda through the reflector: let your eyes adapt and use averted vision on the faint halo.
success_text_zh: 用反射镜看仙女座：让眼睛适应黑暗，用侧视法捕捉暗淡的光晕。

description_en: Earth still turns. Keep Jupiter centered - by hand or with the tracking rate - through the reflector.
description_zh: 地球仍在自转。通过反射镜让木星保持居中——用手修正,或调好追踪速率。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Earth still turns. Keep Jupiter centered - by hand or with the tracking rate - through the reflector.
success_text_zh: 地球仍在自转。通过反射镜让木星保持居中——用手修正,或调好追踪速率。

title_zh: 低空火星与沸腾的大气
description_en: Mars sits low tonight with poor seeing. A big mirror does not cancel the atmosphere - pick your magnification wisely.
description_zh: 今晚火星很低，视宁度糟糕。大口径抵消不了大气——明智地选择倍率。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Mars sits low tonight with poor seeing. A big mirror does not cancel the atmosphere - pick your magnification wisely.
success_text_zh: 今晚火星很低，视宁度糟糕。大口径抵消不了大气——明智地选择倍率。

description_en: Betelgeuse through mirrors: a deep orange-red giant with NO false fringe. A refractor would paint its edge blue and red - your Newtonian shows the star's own color.
description_zh: 用镜面看参宿四：一颗深橙红色的巨星，没有任何虚假彩边。折射镜会给它的边缘涂上红蓝——你的牛顿镜展示的是恒星自己的颜色。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Betelgeuse through mirrors: a deep orange-red giant with NO false fringe. A refractor would paint its edge blue and red - your Newtonian shows the star's own color.
success_text_zh: 用镜面看参宿四：一颗深橙红色的巨星，没有任何虚假彩边。折射镜会给它的边缘涂上红蓝——你的牛顿镜展示的是恒星自己的颜色。

description_en: Final Newtonian exam: collimated optics, steady centering, a clean deep-sky observation. Then Maya opens the next crate.
description_zh: 牛顿镜结业考：准直到位、稳定居中、一次干净的深空观测。然后 Maya 会打开下一个板条箱。
hint_text_en: Follow primary mirror to diagonal secondary to side eyepiece. Collimate the mirrors, focus Vega, and compare its clean edge with the refractor view.
hint_text_zh: 沿主镜、斜副镜、侧置目镜完成光路。准直镜面并对焦织女星，再与折射镜的彩色边缘比较。
success_text_en: Final Newtonian exam: collimated optics, steady centering, a clean deep-sky observation. Then Maya opens the next crate.
success_text_zh: 牛顿镜结业考：准直到位、稳定居中、一次干净的深空观测。然后 Maya 会打开下一个板条箱。

description_en: A Dobsonian is a Newtonian on the simplest possible base. Build it - count how few parts a rocker box needs - and take first light on the Moon.
description_zh: 多布森就是放在最简底座上的牛顿镜。把它装起来——数数摇箱需要多少零件——然后用月球开光。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: A Dobsonian is a Newtonian on the simplest possible base. Build it - count how few parts a rocker box needs - and take first light on the Moon.
success_text_zh: 多布森就是放在最简底座上的牛顿镜。把它装起来——数数摇箱需要多少零件——然后用月球开光。

description_en: No motors, no tracking. Nudge the tube in altitude and azimuth to keep Jupiter centered.
description_zh: 没有马达，没有追踪。用手在高度和方位上轻推镜筒，让木星保持居中。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: No motors, no tracking. Nudge the tube in altitude and azimuth to keep Jupiter centered.
success_text_zh: 没有马达，没有追踪。用手在高度和方位上轻推镜筒，让木星保持居中。

description_en: Longer hold, same hands. Find the push-wait-push rhythm every Dobsonian owner knows.
description_zh: 更长的保持时间，同一双手。找到每个多布森用户都懂的"推-等-推"节奏。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Longer hold, same hands. Find the push-wait-push rhythm every Dobsonian owner knows.
success_text_zh: 更长的保持时间，同一双手。找到每个多布森用户都懂的"推-等-推"节奏。

description_en: Observers call big Dobsonians "light buckets". Point yours at the Orion Nebula and see why.
description_zh: 观测者把大多布森叫作"光之水桶"。把它对准猎户座大星云，看看为什么。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Observers call big Dobsonians "light buckets". Point yours at the Orion Nebula and see why.
success_text_zh: 观测者把大多布森叫作"光之水桶"。把它对准猎户座大星云，看看为什么。

description_en: The 30mm eyepiece gives a wide, bright field. Deep sky rarely wants maximum power - frame the whole galaxy instead.
description_zh: 30mm 目镜给出又宽又亮的视场。深空很少需要最高倍率——把整个星系框进来。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: The 30mm eyepiece gives a wide, bright field. Deep sky rarely wants maximum power - frame the whole galaxy instead.
success_text_zh: 30mm 目镜给出又宽又亮的视场。深空很少需要最高倍率——把整个星系框进来。

description_en: Clouds drift through tonight. Watch the gaps, observe when the sky opens, and do not fight the weather.
description_zh: 今晚有云飘过。盯住云缝，天空放开时抓紧观测，不要和天气较劲。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Clouds drift through tonight. Watch the gaps, observe when the sky opens, and do not fight the weather.
success_text_zh: 今晚有云飘过。盯住云缝，天空放开时抓紧观测，不要和天气较劲。

description_en: Mars hugs the horizon. Apply the seeing lesson: drop the power, wait for still moments.
description_zh: 火星贴着地平线。用上视宁度那一课：降低倍率，等待大气平静的瞬间。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Mars hugs the horizon. Apply the seeing lesson: drop the power, wait for still moments.
success_text_zh: 火星贴着地平线。用上视宁度那一课：降低倍率，等待大气平静的瞬间。

description_en: Focus, track by hand, and pick the right eyepiece - all in one session on Jupiter.
description_zh: 调焦、手动追踪、选对目镜——在一次木星观测里全部用上。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Focus, track by hand, and pick the right eyepiece - all in one session on Jupiter.
success_text_zh: 调焦、手动追踪、选对目镜——在一次木星观测里全部用上。

description_en: A long, steady hold on Andromeda with nothing but your fingertips. The hardest hands-on test in the club.
description_zh: 只靠指尖，对仙女座进行一次漫长而稳定的凝视。俱乐部里最难的手动考验。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: A long, steady hold on Andromeda with nothing but your fingertips. The hardest hands-on test in the club.
success_text_zh: 只靠指尖，对仙女座进行一次漫长而稳定的凝视。俱乐部里最难的手动考验。

description_en: Big mirror, simple box, your hands - prove you can drive it. Then Maya explains why some tubes fold their light.
description_zh: 大主镜、简单摇箱、你的双手——证明你能驾驭它。然后 Maya 会解释为什么有些镜筒要折叠光路。
hint_text_en: The wide rocker mount is part of the telescope. It is built for direct hand guidance.
hint_text_zh: 宽大的摇臂支架也是望远镜的一部分，专为直接手动跟踪而设计。
success_text_en: Big mirror, simple box, your hands - prove you can drive it. Then Maya explains why some tubes fold their light.
success_text_zh: 大主镜、简单摇箱、你的双手——证明你能驾驭它。然后 Maya 会解释为什么有些镜筒要折叠光路。

description_en: Build the Cassegrain: a long telescope hidden in a short tube. First light on the Moon through the rear focuser.
description_zh: 组装卡塞格林：藏在短镜筒里的长望远镜。通过后置调焦座，用月球开光。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Build the Cassegrain: a long telescope hidden in a short tube. First light on the Moon through the rear focuser.
success_text_zh: 组装卡塞格林：藏在短镜筒里的长望远镜。通过后置调焦座，用月球开光。

description_en: Long focal length means high magnification. Jupiter looks bigger than ever - if you can find it in the narrow field.
description_zh: 长焦距意味着高倍率。木星比以往任何时候都大——前提是你能在窄视场里找到它。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Long focal length means high magnification. Jupiter looks bigger than ever - if you can find it in the narrow field.
success_text_zh: 长焦距意味着高倍率。木星比以往任何时候都大——前提是你能在窄视场里找到它。

description_en: A narrow field punishes sloppy aiming. Use the finder scope discipline you learned long ago.
description_zh: 窄视场惩罚粗糙的瞄准。用上你很久以前学会的寻星镜纪律。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: A narrow field punishes sloppy aiming. Use the finder scope discipline you learned long ago.
success_text_zh: 窄视场惩罚粗糙的瞄准。用上你很久以前学会的寻星镜纪律。

description_en: Mars is tiny. The folded path gives you the scale - the atmosphere decides if you keep it.
description_zh: 火星很小。折叠光路给了你放大倍数——大气决定你能不能保住它。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Mars is tiny. The folded path gives you the scale - the atmosphere decides if you keep it.
success_text_zh: 火星很小。折叠光路给了你放大倍数——大气决定你能不能保住它。

description_en: High power amplifies every ripple of air. Wait for the still moments; drop power if they never come.
description_zh: 高倍率会放大每一丝大气抖动。等待平静的瞬间；等不到就降低倍率。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: High power amplifies every ripple of air. Wait for the still moments; drop power if they never come.
success_text_zh: 高倍率会放大每一丝大气抖动。等待平静的瞬间；等不到就降低倍率。

description_en: At high magnification the sky drifts FAST across the narrow field. Keep Mars centered.
description_zh: 高倍率下，天空在窄视场里漂移得飞快。让火星保持居中。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: At high magnification the sky drifts FAST across the narrow field. Keep Mars centered.
success_text_zh: 高倍率下，天空在窄视场里漂移得飞快。让火星保持居中。

description_en: Turn the folded focal length on the Moon: single craters fill the eyepiece.
description_zh: 把折叠焦距对准月球：单个环形山就能填满目镜。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Turn the folded focal length on the Moon: single craters fill the eyepiece.
success_text_zh: 把折叠焦距对准月球：单个环形山就能填满目镜。

description_en: Same Jupiter, two mirrors: the Newtonian showed a wide bright disk, the Cassegrain a large detailed one. Neither is simply better.
description_zh: 同一颗木星，两种镜子：牛顿镜给出宽而亮的圆面，卡塞格林给出大而细的圆面。没有谁全面更好。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Same Jupiter, two mirrors: the Newtonian showed a wide bright disk, the Cassegrain a large detailed one. Neither is simply better.
success_text_zh: 同一颗木星，两种镜子：牛顿镜给出宽而亮的圆面，卡塞格林给出大而细的圆面。没有谁全面更好。

description_en: Clouds cross a narrow field quickly and completely. Time your observation between them.
description_zh: 云穿过窄视场又快又彻底。在云缝之间安排你的观测。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Clouds cross a narrow field quickly and completely. Time your observation between them.
success_text_zh: 云穿过窄视场又快又彻底。在云缝之间安排你的观测。

description_en: Master the folded path under real conditions. Then Maya brings out an even stranger fold - centuries older.
description_zh: 在真实条件下驾驭折叠光路。然后 Maya 拿出一种更奇特的折叠——它还要古老几个世纪。
hint_text_en: The secondary is convex and sends light back through the primary. This is a different folded path, not a Newtonian copy.
hint_text_zh: 凸面副镜将光送回主镜中心孔。这是不同的折叠光路，不是牛顿镜的复制品。
success_text_en: Master the folded path under real conditions. Then Maya brings out an even stranger fold - centuries older.
success_text_zh: 在真实条件下驾驭折叠光路。然后 Maya 拿出一种更奇特的折叠——它还要古老几个世纪。

description_en: Build the Gregorian: light passes through a real focus BEFORE the concave secondary. Alignment must be stricter than anything so far.
description_zh: 组装格里高利镜：光线先穿过一个真实焦点，再到达凹面副镜。对准要求比以往任何一台都严格。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Build the Gregorian: light passes through a real focus BEFORE the concave secondary. Alignment must be stricter than anything so far.
success_text_zh: 组装格里高利镜：光线先穿过一个真实焦点，再到达凹面副镜。对准要求比以往任何一台都严格。

description_en: You observed Sirius with the refractor long ago. Feel where the Gregorian snaps into focus and compare.
description_zh: 很久以前你用折射镜看过天狼星。感受格里高利镜"咔哒"合焦的位置，并做比较。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: You observed Sirius with the refractor long ago. Feel where the Gregorian snaps into focus and compare.
success_text_zh: 很久以前你用折射镜看过天狼星。感受格里高利镜"咔哒"合焦的位置，并做比较。

description_en: The extra focus makes the image upright and high-contrast. Vega, once more, without any fringe.
description_zh: 多出的焦点让成像正立且高对比。再看一次织女星——依然没有任何彩边。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: The extra focus makes the image upright and high-contrast. Vega, once more, without any fringe.
success_text_zh: 多出的焦点让成像正立且高对比。再看一次织女星——依然没有任何彩边。

description_en: Small target, strict optics. Every arcsecond of alignment error shows on Mars.
description_zh: 小目标，严苛光学。每一角秒的对准误差都会显现在火星上。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Small target, strict optics. Every arcsecond of alignment error shows on Mars.
success_text_zh: 小目标，严苛光学。每一角秒的对准误差都会显现在火星上。

description_en: Study Jupiter's cloud bands: the Gregorian's clean contrast is its quiet strength.
description_zh: 研究木星云带：干净的对比度是格里高利镜低调的强项。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Study Jupiter's cloud bands: the Gregorian's clean contrast is its quiet strength.
success_text_zh: 研究木星云带：干净的对比度是格里高利镜低调的强项。

description_en: Can the two-mirror fold handle a faint nebula? Find out on Orion.
description_zh: 双镜折叠能应付暗弱星云吗？在猎户座上找到答案。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Can the two-mirror fold handle a faint nebula? Find out on Orion.
success_text_zh: 双镜折叠能应付暗弱星云吗？在猎户座上找到答案。

description_en: Drift correction through a folded path: keep Sirius centered.
description_zh: 在折叠光路中做漂移修正：让天狼星保持居中。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Drift correction through a folded path: keep Sirius centered.
success_text_zh: 在折叠光路中做漂移修正：让天狼星保持居中。

description_en: Poor seeing on a strict instrument: learn which errors are yours and which are the sky's.
description_zh: 严苛仪器遇上糟糕视宁度：分清哪些误差是你的，哪些是天空的。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Poor seeing on a strict instrument: learn which errors are yours and which are the sky's.
success_text_zh: 严苛仪器遇上糟糕视宁度：分清哪些误差是你的，哪些是天空的。

description_en: Newtonian, Cassegrain, Gregorian - each fold has a reason. Prove you can explain all three on golden Arcturus.
description_zh: 牛顿、卡塞格林、格里高利——每种折叠都有理由。用金色的大角星证明你能说清这三者。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: Newtonian, Cassegrain, Gregorian - each fold has a reason. Prove you can explain all three on golden Arcturus.
success_text_zh: 牛顿、卡塞格林、格里高利——每种折叠都有理由。用金色的大角星证明你能说清这三者。

description_en: The last ground telescope exam. Every mirror you own still fights one enemy: the atmosphere itself.
description_zh: 最后一场地面望远镜考试。你拥有的每一面镜子仍在对抗同一个敌人：大气本身。
hint_text_en: Both mirrors are concave in this system. The secondary sits beyond the first focus.
hint_text_zh: 该系统中的两面镜子都是凹面，副镜位于第一个焦点之后。
success_text_en: The last ground telescope exam. Every mirror you own still fights one enemy: the atmosphere itself.
success_text_zh: 最后一场地面望远镜考试。你拥有的每一面镜子仍在对抗同一个敌人：大气本身。

description_en: Assemble the segmented space telescope: 18 mirror segments, an infrared instrument package, and a tennis-court sunshield.
description_zh: 组装分段式空间望远镜：18 块镜片、红外仪器包，和一面网球场大小的遮阳板。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Assemble the segmented space telescope: 18 mirror segments, an infrared instrument package, and a tennis-court sunshield.
success_text_zh: 组装分段式空间望远镜：18 块镜片、红外仪器包，和一面网球场大小的遮阳板。

description_en: Infrared is not visible light. Point at Orion and ask a different question: not "what shines" but "what is warm".
description_zh: 红外不是可见光。对准猎户座，问一个不同的问题：不是"什么在发光"，而是"什么是温热的"。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Infrared is not visible light. Point at Orion and ask a different question: not "what shines" but "what is warm".
success_text_zh: 红外不是可见光。对准猎户座，问一个不同的问题：不是"什么在发光"，而是"什么是温热的"。

description_en: Dust blocks visible light but not infrared. Find the newborn stars hiding inside the nebula.
description_zh: 尘埃挡住可见光，却挡不住红外。找到藏在星云内部的新生恒星。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Dust blocks visible light but not infrared. Find the newborn stars hiding inside the nebula.
success_text_zh: 尘埃挡住可见光，却挡不住红外。找到藏在星云内部的新生恒星。

description_en: A warm infrared telescope observes only itself. Manage the sunshield so the instruments stay cold.
description_zh: 发热的红外望远镜只能观测它自己。用好遮阳板，让仪器保持低温。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: A warm infrared telescope observes only itself. Manage the sunshield so the instruments stay cold.
success_text_zh: 发热的红外望远镜只能观测它自己。用好遮阳板，让仪器保持低温。

description_en: Point the telescope AND keep Sun, Earth and Moon behind the shield - both at once.
description_zh: 既要指向目标，又要让太阳、地球和月亮全躲在遮阳板后——两者必须同时成立。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Point the telescope AND keep Sun, Earth and Moon behind the shield - both at once.
success_text_zh: 既要指向目标，又要让太阳、地球和月亮全躲在遮阳板后——两者必须同时成立。

description_en: Andromeda in infrared shows warm dust lanes invisible from the ground. Map them.
description_zh: 红外下的仙女座露出地面看不见的温暖尘埃带。把它们描绘出来。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Andromeda in infrared shows warm dust lanes invisible from the ground. Map them.
success_text_zh: 红外下的仙女座露出地面看不见的温暖尘埃带。把它们描绘出来。

description_en: Compare tonight's Orion with your Newtonian records: what did the atmosphere steal from you?
description_zh: 把今晚的猎户座和你的牛顿镜记录对比：大气到底偷走了什么？
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Compare tonight's Orion with your Newtonian records: what did the atmosphere steal from you?
success_text_zh: 把今晚的猎户座和你的牛顿镜记录对比：大气到底偷走了什么？

description_en: Betelgeuse is cool and red - a natural infrared beacon. Measure the giant.
description_zh: 参宿四又冷又红——天生的红外灯塔。测量这颗巨星。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Betelgeuse is cool and red - a natural infrared beacon. Measure the giant.
success_text_zh: 参宿四又冷又红——天生的红外灯塔。测量这颗巨星。

description_en: Deploy, cool, point, observe: run a complete infrared session by yourself.
description_zh: 展开、降温、指向、观测：独立完成一次完整的红外观测。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: Deploy, cool, point, observe: run a complete infrared session by yourself.
success_text_zh: 展开、降温、指向、观测：独立完成一次完整的红外观测。

description_en: You now observe light no eye can see. There is radiation even "colder" than infrared - and for that, we have a giant in Guizhou.
description_zh: 你已能观测眼睛看不见的光。还有比红外"更冷"的辐射——为了它，我们在贵州有一个巨人。
hint_text_en: Segments must act as one surface before the infrared instrument can form a useful image.
hint_text_zh: 分段镜片必须像一个整体工作，红外仪器才能形成有效图像。
success_text_en: You now observe light no eye can see. There is radiation even "colder" than infrared - and for that, we have a giant in Guizhou.
success_text_zh: 你已能观测眼睛看不见的光。还有比红外"更冷"的辐射——为了它，我们在贵州有一个巨人。

description_en: Set up FAST: active dish, suspended feed cabin, signal processor. There is no eyepiece - there never will be.
description_zh: 搭建 FAST：主动反射面、悬吊馈源舱、信号处理器。这里没有目镜——永远不会有。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Set up FAST: active dish, suspended feed cabin, signal processor. There is no eyepiece - there never will be.
success_text_zh: 搭建 FAST：主动反射面、悬吊馈源舱、信号处理器。这里没有目镜——永远不会有。

description_en: Sweep the frequency band until the pulsar's repeating pulse rises out of the noise.
description_zh: 扫过频段，直到脉冲星重复的脉冲从噪声中浮现。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Sweep the frequency band until the pulsar's repeating pulse rises out of the noise.
success_text_zh: 扫过频段，直到脉冲星重复的脉冲从噪声中浮现。

description_en: Read the trace and measure the period: 0.714 seconds per revolution of a dead star.
description_zh: 读取轨迹并测量周期：一颗死亡恒星每 0.714 秒自转一圈。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Read the trace and measure the period: 0.714 seconds per revolution of a dead star.
success_text_zh: 读取轨迹并测量周期：一颗死亡恒星每 0.714 秒自转一圈。

description_en: A radio telescope points with signal strength. Move the feed until the pulse peaks - that is your pulsar.
description_zh: 射电望远镜靠信号强度指向。移动馈源直到脉冲最强——那就是你的脉冲星。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: A radio telescope points with signal strength. Move the feed until the pulse peaks - that is your pulsar.
success_text_zh: 射电望远镜靠信号强度指向。移动馈源直到脉冲最强——那就是你的脉冲星。

description_en: Tonight the pulse barely clears the noise floor. Tune finer, read more carefully.
description_zh: 今晚脉冲勉强高出噪声底。调得更细，读得更仔细。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Tonight the pulse barely clears the noise floor. Tune finer, read more carefully.
success_text_zh: 今晚脉冲勉强高出噪声底。调得更细，读得更仔细。

description_en: Longer listening makes faint pulses add up. Radio astronomy rewards patience with certainty.
description_zh: 听得更久，微弱脉冲就会累加起来。射电天文用确定性回报耐心。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Longer listening makes faint pulses add up. Radio astronomy rewards patience with certainty.
success_text_zh: 听得更久，微弱脉冲就会累加起来。射电天文用确定性回报耐心。

description_en: The feed cabin hangs from cables above the dish. Practice fine positioning against a moving sky.
description_zh: 馈源舱靠缆索悬在反射面上方。练习在移动的天空下做精细定位。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: The feed cabin hangs from cables above the dish. Practice fine positioning against a moving sky.
success_text_zh: 馈源舱靠缆索悬在反射面上方。练习在移动的天空下做精细定位。

description_en: Interference is radio astronomy's light pollution. Learn to tell the pulsar from human noise.
description_zh: 干扰就是射电天文的光污染。学会把脉冲星和人造噪声区分开。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Interference is radio astronomy's light pollution. Learn to tell the pulsar from human noise.
success_text_zh: 干扰就是射电天文的光污染。学会把脉冲星和人造噪声区分开。

description_en: Tune, localize, measure, record - one complete radio observation, alone.
description_zh: 调谐、定位、测量、记录——独立完成一次完整的射电观测。
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Tune, localize, measure, record - one complete radio observation, alone.
success_text_zh: 调谐、定位、测量、记录——独立完成一次完整的射电观测。

description_en: Data IS the observation - you have proven it. One question remains: what happens when every window opens at once?
description_zh: 数据本身就是观测——你已经证明了这一点。只剩一个问题：当所有窗口同时打开，会发生什么？
hint_text_en: Radio astronomy collects waves you cannot see, then turns them into a spectrum or pulse trace.
hint_text_zh: 无线电天文收集肉眼看不见的电波，再把它们转换成频谱或脉冲轨迹。
success_text_en: Data IS the observation - you have proven it. One question remains: what happens when every window opens at once?
success_text_zh: 数据本身就是观测——你已经证明了这一点。只剩一个问题：当所有窗口同时打开，会发生什么？

description_en: One nebula, three observatories. Decide which instrument answers tonight's question.
description_zh: 一片星云，三座观测台。决定哪台仪器能回答今晚的问题。
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: One nebula, three observatories. Decide which instrument answers tonight's question.
success_text_zh: 一片星云，三座观测台。决定哪台仪器能回答今晚的问题。

description_en: Observe Orion in visible light and infrared, and note what each reveals that the other hides.
description_zh: 分别用可见光和红外观测猎户座，记下彼此揭示与隐藏的东西。
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: Observe Orion in visible light and infrared, and note what each reveals that the other hides.
success_text_zh: 分别用可见光和红外观测猎户座，记下彼此揭示与隐藏的东西。

description_en: Stars in visible light, dust in infrared, cold gas in radio: three portraits of one galaxy.
description_zh: 可见光里的恒星、红外里的尘埃、射电里的冷气体：同一个星系的三幅肖像。
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: Stars in visible light, dust in infrared, cold gas in radio: three portraits of one galaxy.
success_text_zh: 可见光里的恒星、红外里的尘埃、射电里的冷气体：同一个星系的三幅肖像。

description_en: Lay the three records side by side. What claim does EVERY window support?
description_zh: 把三份记录并排放好。哪个结论是所有窗口都支持的？
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: Lay the three records side by side. What claim does EVERY window support?
success_text_zh: 把三份记录并排放好。哪个结论是所有窗口都支持的？

description_en: No instructions this time. Pick the question, pick the instrument, run the observation.
description_zh: 这次没有指令。自己提问题、自己选仪器、自己完成观测。
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: No instructions this time. Pick the question, pick the instrument, run the observation.
success_text_zh: 这次没有指令。自己提问题、自己选仪器、自己完成观测。

description_en: Everything you have learned, in one report: one galaxy, every window of light, one supported conclusion.
description_zh: 把你学到的一切写进一份报告：一个星系、所有的光之窗口、一个被证据支持的结论。
hint_text_en: Different observatories do not compete for one winner. Each measures a different part of the target.
hint_text_zh: 不同观测台不是为了争夺唯一胜者，它们各自测量目标的不同部分。
success_text_en: Everything you have learned, in one report: one galaxy, every window of light, one supported conclusion.
success_text_zh: 把你学到的一切写进一份报告：一个星系、所有的光之窗口、一个被证据支持的结论。
